title: Break-Even Analysis Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Break-Even Analysis skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

total_fixed_costs.description: Total fixed costs per period (rent, salaries, depreciation, SG&A overheads)

variable_cost_per.description: Variable cost per unit (materials, direct labor, commissions, shipping)

selling_price_per.description: Selling price per unit or average revenue per unit

projection_period.description: Projection period (monthly, quarterly, or annual basis)

target_profit_ebitda.description: Target profit or EBITDA for target-profit break-even extension

current_projected_sales.description: Current or projected sales volume (to calculate margin of safety)
